subject: How to set up recurring tasks in Kanbix?
message:
Hi there,

I recently started using Kanbix for my team's weekly sprint planning. We have a set of tasks that repeat every Monday, such as standup prep, backlog grooming notes, and retrospective scheduling. I was wondering if there's a way to create recurring tasks automatically so we don't have to manually duplicate them each week.

If this feature exists, could you point me to the relevant documentation? Thanks in advance!
hey how do i add labels to my cards?

subject: Cannot drag cards between columns
message: Since this morning, I am unable to drag and drop cards between columns on my project board. The cards highlight when I click them but they snap back to the original column when I release. I am using Chrome 121 on macOS Sonoma. This is blocking my entire team's workflow.

subject: Onboarding assistance for new team of 15
message:
Hello Kanbix Support,

We just purchased the Business plan for our product team of 15 people. I'm the team lead and I need some guidance on the best way to set everyone up. Specifically, I'd like to know the recommended approach for creating workspace roles, setting up our first project boards, and importing tasks from our existing spreadsheets.

Is there a guided onboarding flow or should I schedule a call with your team? We'd love to get started this week.

Best regards,
David Cho
just signed up. where do i start? 😅

subject: NOTHING WORKS AND YOUR TOOL LOST MY DATA
message: I AM ABSOLUTELY FURIOUS. I SPENT THE ENTIRE WEEKEND SETTING UP A PROJECT WITH OVER 200 CARDS AND WHEN I LOGGED IN THIS MORNING EVERYTHING WAS GONE. THE ENTIRE BOARD IS EMPTY. THIS IS COMPLETELY UNACCEPTABLE AND I NEED THIS RESOLVED IMMEDIATELY. IF MY DATA CANNOT BE RECOVERED I WILL BE SEEKING LEGAL REMEDIES. YOUR PRODUCT WASTED HOURS OF MY TIME AND MY CLIENTS ARE DEPENDING ON THIS INFORMATION.

subject: Connecting Kanbix to GitHub
message: I'm trying to connect my GitHub repository to Kanbix so that pull request events automatically update card status. I followed the docs but the OAuth authorization screen gives me a 403 error. My GitHub account has admin access to the repo. Can you help troubleshoot?
hi, i got charged twice this month for my pro plan. can u check pls?

subject: Request for annual billing discount for 50-seat license
message:
Hi Kanbix Team,

We're currently evaluating project management tools for our company and Kanbix is our top choice. We'd need approximately 50 seats on the Business plan. Before we commit, I'd like to discuss whether there's any volume discount available for annual billing at this scale.

Also, could you share details about your enterprise plan? We may need SSO and audit logs down the line. Looking forward to hearing from you.

Thank you,
Robert Tanaka
Head of Operations, Bluepoint Solutions
can i assign multiple ppl to one card?

subject: How to set up automation for moving cards
message: I'd like to create a rule that automatically moves a card to the 'Review' column when a checklist is fully completed. Is this possible in Kanbix? If so, where do I find the automation builder?

subject: Feedback: Kanbix has transformed our workflow
message:
Dear Kanbix Team,

I just wanted to take a moment to share how much our design agency has benefited from switching to Kanbix six months ago. The timeline view, in particular, has been a game-changer for managing client deliverables. Our project completion rate has improved by about 30% and the team genuinely enjoys using the tool.

The recent update to the card detail view is beautiful too. Thank you for continuously improving the product. Keep up the excellent work!

Warm regards,
Tom Hartley
Creative Director, Red Canvas Design
forgot my password and the reset email isnt coming thru. checked spam too. help?

subject: Slack integration not sending notifications
message: I set up the Slack integration last week and it was working fine initially. Since yesterday, card update notifications have stopped appearing in our #project-updates channel. The integration still shows as connected in Kanbix settings. Nothing has changed on our Slack workspace side.

subject: Inviting team members - getting error
message:
Hi,

I'm trying to invite three team members to our workspace but I keep getting an error that says 'Invitation limit reached.' We're on the Pro plan which should allow up to 20 members, and we currently only have 5. Could this be a bug, or is there something I'm missing in the settings?

I'd appreciate a quick resolution since we need these people onboarded by Friday.

Thanks,
Karen Mitchell
yo is there a dark mode? cant find it anywhere

subject: How to use Gantt chart view
message: I recently upgraded to the Business plan and I understand it includes a Gantt chart view. However, I cannot find where to enable it for my existing boards. Could you provide step-by-step instructions?

subject: Automation rule triggers incorrectly
message:
Hello,

I set up an automation rule that should move cards to 'Done' when the due date passes and the card is in 'In Progress.' However, it's also moving cards that are in the 'Backlog' column, which is not part of the rule condition. I've double-checked the rule configuration and the source column is definitely set to 'In Progress' only.

This has caused confusion on my team because cards keep disappearing from the backlog. Could you please investigate?

Regards,
Derek Lawson
the mobile app keeps crashing when i open my board. android 14. started today

subject: Importing tasks from CSV
message: We are migrating from spreadsheets to Kanbix. I have a CSV file with about 400 tasks including columns for title, description, assignee, and due date. What is the correct CSV format for importing and is there a row limit per import?

subject: Google Drive integration - file attachments not syncing
message:
Hi Kanbix Support,

We recently connected our Google Drive workspace to Kanbix. File attachments added through the Kanbix card interface upload successfully, but they don't appear in the designated Google Drive folder. Conversely, files added directly to the Drive folder don't show up as attachments on the Kanbix cards.

We expected bidirectional sync based on the integration description. Are we missing a configuration step, or is this a known limitation?

Best,
Michael Strauss
pls how do I filter cards by due date

subject: Setting up 2FA on my account
message: I'd like to enable two-factor authentication on my Kanbix account. I went to Account Settings > Security but I don't see a 2FA option. Is this feature available on the free plan, or do I need to upgrade?

subject: Board sharing permissions question
message:
Good afternoon,

I need to share a project board with an external client, but I only want them to have view-only access. They should be able to see card titles, descriptions, and due dates, but not move cards, add comments, or see internal labels we use for priority.

Is this level of granular permission available? If so, how do I configure it?

Cheers,
Aiden Clarke
hi! just created my workspace but idk how to add columns to the board 😬

subject: Bug: Due date shows wrong timezone
message: Due dates on cards are displaying in UTC instead of my local timezone (CET, UTC+1). I have set my timezone correctly in profile settings. When I set a due date for 'Feb 20, 5:00 PM', the card shows 'Feb 20, 4:00 PM'. This is causing missed deadlines because team members think they have an extra hour.

subject: Zapier integration - trigger not firing
message:
Hello,

I've set up a Zap that should create a new Kanbix card whenever a new row is added to a Google Sheet. The Zap tested successfully during setup, but in production, new rows are not triggering card creation. The Zapier task history shows no attempts.

I've already re-authenticated the Kanbix connection in Zapier and confirmed the trigger is set to 'New Spreadsheet Row.' Could there be a webhook issue on Kanbix's end?

Thanks,
Linda Park
how to export board to pdf??

subject: New user - need help setting up first project
message: I just signed up for Kanbix Free and I'm a bit overwhelmed by the interface. I manage a small non-profit team of 4 people and we want to track grant application deadlines and volunteer coordination. Could you recommend a template or a quick-start guide that would work for our use case?

subject: Requesting refund for unused months
message:
Hi,

We purchased an annual Business plan in October but our company went through a restructuring and we no longer need the tool. We've only used it for 4 months out of the 12-month subscription. I'd like to request a prorated refund for the remaining 8 months.

Our account is under workspace 'SilverOak-PM' and the billing contact is angela.morrison@silveroak.com. Please let me know the process for this.

Regards,
Angela Morrison
is it possible to set WIP limits on columns

subject: Automation: auto-assign cards based on label
message: I want to set up an automation rule where any card tagged with the label 'Design' is automatically assigned to a specific team member. Is this supported in Kanbix's automation builder? If not, can I achieve this through the API or Zapier?

subject: Data processing agreement and compliance
message:
Dear Kanbix Team,

Our legal department requires a signed Data Processing Agreement before we can continue using Kanbix for client-facing projects. We also need confirmation of GDPR compliance and information about where our data is stored and processed.

Our lawyer has specifically requested these documents by end of next week. If we cannot obtain them, we will unfortunately need to discontinue use of the platform and explore alternatives.

Please advise on how to proceed.

Regards,
Patricia Holmes
Compliance Officer, Castlegate Legal
hi can i use kanbix for free with my team of 3?

subject: Checklist items not saving
message: When I add checklist items to a card and close the card detail view, the items disappear. I have to re-add them every time. This happens consistently across all my boards. I'm using Firefox 122 on Windows 11. Cleared cache and cookies, same issue.

subject: How does Kanbix compare to Trello?
message:
Hi,

Our department has been using Trello for the past two years and we're considering switching to Kanbix. Could you help me understand what Kanbix offers that Trello doesn't? Specifically, I'm interested in time tracking, built-in reporting, and the ability to manage dependencies between tasks.

Also, is there a migration tool to import our existing Trello boards into Kanbix?

Thanks,
Jessica Morales
notifications r broken. im not getting any email notifs since yday even tho theyre turned on in settings

subject: Suggestion: Calendar view integration
message: I love using Kanbix for sprint planning. One feature I'd really appreciate is a calendar view that syncs with Google Calendar. It would be great to see card due dates as calendar events without having to set up a separate Zapier integration. Just a suggestion for the roadmap!

subject: Changing workspace owner
message:
Hello,

Our original workspace owner, Marcus Reed, has left the company. I need to transfer workspace ownership to my account (samantha.reed@copperfieldmfg.com). Marcus's email has already been deactivated by our IT department, so he cannot perform the transfer himself.

Could you guide me through the process or handle the transfer on your end? I can provide any verification you need.

Thank you,
Samantha Reed

subject: Cannot see archived boards
message: I archived a project board last month and now I need to access it again. However, I cannot find the archived boards section anywhere in the interface. The documentation says there should be an 'Archived' tab in the workspace sidebar but I don't see it. Am I looking in the wrong place?

subject: Automation for due date reminders
message:
Hi there,

I'd like to set up automated reminders that notify card assignees 24 hours before a due date. I see there's a notification settings page, but I want this to work as a Slack message rather than an email notification. Is there a way to combine the automation builder with the Slack integration to achieve this?

Any guidance would be appreciated.

Best,
Gregory Barnes
whats the diff between pro and business plan? thinking of upgrading

subject: Webhook payload documentation
message: I'm building a custom integration using Kanbix webhooks. The API docs show how to set up a webhook endpoint but I can't find documentation on the actual payload structure for different event types. Could you point me to the full webhook payload reference or provide a sample payload for the 'card.moved' event?

subject: Invoice needed for expense report
message:
Hi Kanbix Billing,

I need a proper invoice with our company VAT number for the last three months of our Pro plan subscription. Our finance department requires this for quarterly expense reporting. The VAT number is DE312456789 and the company name should appear as 'Clearwater Analytics GmbH.'

Could you regenerate the invoices with this information included? The existing receipts in the billing portal don't have the VAT number field.

Thank you,
Rebecca Hoffman
hey i just joined my teams workspace but i can only see 1 board. my manager said theres 5. what am i missing

subject: Feature request: time tracking
message: I'd love to see native time tracking built into Kanbix cards. Currently we use Toggl alongside Kanbix and switching between tools is tedious. Even a simple start/stop timer on each card with basic reporting would be incredibly useful for our agency's client billing.

subject: Cannot log in after password change
message:
Hello,

I changed my password yesterday through the account settings page. The change appeared to go through successfully, but now I cannot log in with either the old or new password. The 'Forgot Password' link sends a reset email, but clicking the reset link gives me a 'Token expired' error even though I click it within seconds of receiving the email.

I'm completely locked out of my account and have a critical board review with my team in 2 hours. Please help urgently.

Peter Gallagher
human

subject: Custom fields not appearing in reports
message:
Hello Kanbix Team,

I created several custom fields on my cards (Client Name, Project Phase, Budget Estimate) and filled them in across approximately 80 cards. When I try to generate a board report, these custom fields are not available as columns or filter options in the report builder.

Is there a way to include custom fields in reports? This is essential for our weekly stakeholder updates.

Thank you,
Christine Delacroix
hi its margaret thornton again. i emailed earlier about my missing board data. still havent heard back. this is really urgent pls 😤

subject: New workspace setup for construction team
message: We just purchased 10 seats on the Business plan for our construction project management team. I need guidance on setting up workspaces for different job sites, configuring role-based access so subcontractors can only see their assigned boards, and importing our existing project timelines. Is there an onboarding specialist we can schedule a call with?
can i change the background color of my board? want to make each project look diff

subject: Security concern - unauthorized access
message: I noticed unfamiliar activity on our workspace this morning. Cards were moved and comments were added by a user account I don't recognize (display name 'svc-test'). We have not invited this person. I'm concerned about unauthorized access to our workspace which contains sensitive client project data. Please investigate immediately.

subject: Billing discrepancy - will involve my lawyer if unresolved
message:
Dear Kanbix,

For the third consecutive month, I have been charged EUR 49.99 instead of the EUR 29.99 that was quoted to me when I signed up for the annual Pro plan in September. I have raised this issue twice before via your web form and received no resolution, only generic responses asking me to check my plan settings.

I have kept records of all correspondence and the original pricing confirmation email. If this overcharge is not corrected and the difference refunded within 5 business days, I will have no choice but to involve my lawyer to recover the funds.

I expect a prompt and serious response this time.

Martin Schultz
